live_bridge_alignment.bridge_strategy: control the compression-descendant commutator after the central split
live_bridge_alignment.current_strength_statement: neither exact vanishing nor uniform quadratic smallness is proved on the live corpus

notes: This is an extension route, not a theorem hidden in the current corpus.
Internalizing this route would promote C_hat_e^cand, but it would still not solve the affine common-shift breaker A_ch by itself.

conclusions: all surviving centered P_r->P_r corrections factor through P_r->Q_r->P_r
hypotheses: C_r^act = cent(P_r D_r P_r + P_r D_r Q_r Theta_r Q_r D_r P_r)
theorem.statement: Assume the actual centered compressed generator has centered Schur-type form C_act = cent(PDP + PDQ Theta QDP) with refinement-uniform ||Theta|| <= M and proxy C_proxy = cent(PDP). Then exact vanishing holds when [P,D] = 0, while otherwise ||C_act - C_proxy|| <= 2 M ||[P,D]||^2 and ||[C_act, C_proxy]|| <= 4 M ||C_proxy|| ||[P,D]||^2.
